summary: Four fixes in sync.go: (1) treat non-empty next_cursor as hasMore=true; (2) cursorParam 'after' → 'cursor'; (3) sinceParam 'since' → 'created_after'; (4) incremental sync clears cursor and uses created_after filter instead of resuming from positional cursor.
reason: Fathom's cursor is positional (descending order) not temporal — resuming it on incremental sync re-fetches old meetings rather than new ones. The correct incremental approach is to start from page 1 filtered by created_after=last_synced_at.
validated_outcome: Full sync fetches all 3,366 meetings; incremental sync completes in ~3 seconds fetching only 1 new record.
